description:
Well, I just played this 9x9 and...

Have fun!

("The h*ck with instructions - Let the overall position speak",
Thanks Chrise, Grebble and erik as well as everybody else...;)

(For "n00bs" - According to japanese rules, no "territory" owned by a group in a seki is counted.)
sgf:
(;SZ[9]C['Poor black - That mean white keeps attacking...' - White just played at 'A' how to respond? (KOMI=0.5)]AB[ig]AB[hg]AB[gg]AB[gh]AB[fg]AB[eh]AB[ei]AW[di]AW[dh]AW[dg]AW[eg]AW[ef]AW[ff]AW[gf]AW[hf]AW[if]AW[fi]LB[fi:A]AB[ah]AB[bg]AB[ch]AB[cg]AB[ci]AB[bi]AB[ag]AB[be]AW[ad]AW[bd]AW[cd]AW[de]AW[dc]AW[dd]AW[ec]AB[fe]AB[ge]AB[he]AB[ie]AB[ed]AB[gc]AW[cb]AW[ca]AW[df]AB[gb]AB[ga]AW[fc]AW[fb]AW[fa]AB[ce]AW[ae]AB[fd]AW[ee]AB[hc]AP[goproblems]
(;B[fh];W[hi]
(;B[hh];W[ih];B[ii]C[Ko. (Black wins the ko, and lives with 6-4=2 points - The best solution! - White'll play his biggest threat, worth 4 pts, black can ignore, and win 2 ;)]MA[ih];W[cf]
(;B[gi];W[bf]C[Nice! (Black won 2 points out of this sequence..And wins by half a point!)RIGHT])
(;B[bf];W[ih]LB[fg:x]LB[gg:x]LB[hg:x]LB[ig:x]LB[gh:x]LB[hh:x]LB[fh:x]LB[eh:x]LB[ei:x]C[Black has no threats... therefore the marked group dies, and black loses...]MA[ii]))
(;B[gi];W[ih]C[Seki. (Black gets 1 point out of the sequence - The prisoner. And white wins by 0.5!)])
(;B[ii];W[ih];B[gi]C[Seki. (Black gets 1 point out of the sequence, so does white - The prisoners. And white wins by 1.5!)]))
(;B[gi];W[fh]C[Black's dead. (Can't get 2 eyes. And black loses shamefully..)]LB[gg:x]LB[hg:x]LB[ig:x]LB[gi:x]LB[fg:x]LB[gh:x])
(;B[hh];W[fh]
(;B[gi];W[ii]C[Black's dead! (Do I really, have to say that black loses the game?)])
(;B[ii];W[gi]C[Black's dead!]))
(;B[hi]C[White would always play at G2 here, as it's much better for him.]
(;W[fh]C[Black lives. (But he lost 2 points - Both black and white have 2 points of territory. But white has 2 prisoners.)];B[ih]C[Black lives. (BUT, he lost 2 points - Both black and white have 2 points of territory. But white also has 2 prisoners. White wins by 3.5!)])
(;W[ih]C[Wouldn't ever happen, because.. (Next move..)];B[fh]C[Black lives with 7 points! What a shame, that white wouldn't let this happen, eh? (I mean, you'd win by 6.5...It'd be nice, eh?;)]))
(;B[ih]C[White would always respond at G2, as it's clearly better for him..]
(;W[fh];B[hi]C[Black lives. (BUT, he lost 2 points - Both black and white have 2 points of territory. But white also has 2 prisoners. White wins by 3.5!)])
(;W[hi]C[This would never happen, because... (Next move..)];B[fh]C[And white plays..];W[gi]C[Seki. What a shame it'd never happen? Dunno... Afterall, seki, isn't the best solution..]))
(;B[bf];W[fh]LB[fg:x]LB[gg:x]LB[hg:x]LB[ig:x]LB[gh:x]C[The marked group dies, and black loses, the game..])
(;B[cf];W[fh]C[The marked group dies, and black loses, the game..]LB[fg:x]LB[hg:x]LB[ig:x]LB[gg:x]LB[gh:x]))
